expectations.text: Output is a single valid HTML file (has <!DOCTYPE html> and closing </html>)
File contains a design rationale comment block documenting source material, detected niche, preserved elements, and improvements
expectations.evidence: No design rationale comment block — only bare section labels like <!-- Nav -->

expectations.text: Tailwind CSS is loaded via CDN script tag
The exact headline 'Ship faster. Break nothing.' appears in the output
Both 'Start Free Trial' and 'See Demo' CTAs are present
expectations.evidence: 'Start Free Trial' and 'See Demo' both present as anchor elements

expectations.text: Mobile hamburger menu is implemented (look for hamburger/menu icon and toggle logic in JS)
expectations.evidence: SVG hamburger button + JS classList toggle present

expectations.text: Page includes more than just the hero — has at least one additional section (features, testimonials, pricing, or footer)
Page has at least title, meta description, and og:title tags
expectations.evidence: Has <title> but no <meta name="description"> or <meta property="og:title">

expectations.text: File contains at least 10 lines of vanilla JavaScript for interactivity
expectations.evidence: Script block has 12 lines covering menu toggle and smooth scroll
